name: ExtensionImmunizationRecommendation_Recommendation_TargetDisease
title: R5: targetDisease
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImmunizationRecommendation.recommendation.targetDisease` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
A given instance of the .recommendation backbone element should correspond to a single recommended administration but sometimes that administration (e.g. MMR) will encompass multiple diseases, thus the targetDisease element is allowed to repeat.

element.definition: The targeted disease for the recommendation.
element.comment: A given instance of the .recommendation backbone element should correspond to a single recommended administration but sometimes that administration (e.g. MMR) will encompass multiple diseases, thus the targetDisease element is allowed to repeat.
